pending_by_reason_top: Public CWMU big-game permits use the Utah bonus model and only promote rows with proven public-draw source data, valid quota, and modeled bonus probabilities.

Antlerless moose uses the Utah bonus model and only promotes rows with valid source history, forecast quota, and modeled bonus probabilities.
Draw-only youth elk stays in scope but remains pending until current-year quota and mechanics are source-proven.
Limited-entry turkey uses the Utah bonus model and only promotes rows with proven limited-entry public-draw source data, valid quota, and modeled bonus probabilities.
